channel.title: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20's Adventuring Party on Dropout.tv

item.title: When the Aioli Hits
item.description:
The cast discuss their recent battle, body swapping mechanics, and taste one of Bert's specialties.

Duration: 29:01

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Skanking in Crocs
item.description:
The cast discuss the origins of the Legio Rex, the inner lives of NPCs, and Gotch's Ska connection.

Duration: 33:03

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Two Guys and a Brachiosaurus
item.description:
The cast chat about their discoveries in Tabira City, sick tattoos, and the lust of battle.

Duration: 21:47

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Rachael Ray Ramantsu
item.description:
The cast discuss the inhabitants of Zood, the search for Comfrey, and the eldritch horror of hands.

Duration: 25:18

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
